title: habenaria repens var. maxillaris
intro: Habenaria repens var. maxillaris, also known as the creeping orchid, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Habenaria genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Habenaria repens var. maxillaris include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
